source.cookbook: The Vegan Korean   Complete Guide And Cookbook so
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
3-5 Tbs pepper paste
	3-5 Tbs sugar
	1-2 tsp black bean sauce
	8-10 cloves garlic, minced
	1 tsp aged soy sauce
	1-2 tsp salt
	1/2-1 Tbs gochugaru
ingredients.original:
3-5 Tbs pepper paste
	3-5 Tbs sugar
	1-2 tsp black bean sauce
	8-10 cloves garlic, minced
	1 tsp aged soy sauce
	1-2 tsp salt
	1/2-1 Tbs gochugaru

ingredients.item:
4-5 cups tube shaped rice cake 
	6 cabbage leaves, chopped
	1 onion, sliced
	2 carrots, sliced into matchsticks
	2 cups of large green onions, sliced on the angle into large chunks
	some kombu broth
	sesame seeds
ingredients.original:
4-5 cups tube shaped rice cake 
	6 cabbage leaves, chopped
	1 onion, sliced
	2 carrots, sliced into matchsticks
	2 cups of large green onions, sliced on the angle into large chunks
	some kombu broth
	sesame seeds

ingredients.item:
1 package of Korean ramen noodles
	Fried Mandu (Dumplings)
	Fried Kim-mari (laver wraps, these are sweet potato noodles wraped in kim/nori seaweed)
